verdict: Current neutral scalar labels/D17 support do not force the response space to be rank one.  With two neutral scalars carrying identical listed labels, the symmetry commutant contains a rank-two positive response family.  Source-only C_ss data can remain fixed while the canonical-Higgs overlap is not certified by symmetry alone.  A rank-one result still requires a dynamical theorem, C_sH/C_HH Gram purity data, or another accepted Higgs-identity certificate.
